subject: fix(export): timestamp first in filenames, drop app name prefix
body:
Move timestamp to start of filename so downloads sort newest-first
alphabetically. Drop "canvagrid-" prefix — adds noise without value
since the platform name already identifies the file.

Added year (YY) to timestamp for cross-year sorting.

Example: 260306-1423-instagram-feed-portrait-1080x1350-p01.png

Tags: export, filenames, ux
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: export
Semver: patch
